TORNADO REPORTED NEAR RIVERWIND. DAMAGE INCLUDES DOWNED POWERLINES, A SHED DESTROYED, A DAMAGED SEMI-TRUCK, AND SEVERAL DOWNED TREES.
REPORT OF STREET FLOODING WITH STALLED VEHICLES.

IN SOUTHWEST OKLAHOMA CITY.

AN EF1 TORNADO DEVELOPED IN NORTHWEST SEMINOLE AND MOVED SOUTHEAST THROUGH TOWN. A FEW RESIDENIAL AND BUSINESS BUILDINGS HAD SOME DAMAGE, INCLUDING AT LEAST TWO HOMES PARTIALLY UNROOFED. TREE AND POWER LINE DAMAGE OCCURRED ALONG THE PATH. THE TORNADO HAD A PATH LENGTH OF APPROXIMATELY 2 MILES AND PATH WIDTH OF 150 YARDS.
